items.question: How much does it cost to repair an AC in Kendall?
items.answer: Common diagnostics range from $75 to $200. Most are resolved the same day. Call for a free estimate.

items.question: Do you offer emergency service?
items.answer: Yes, 24/7 service 365 days a year. There is always a technician available in Kendall.

items.question: Are the technicians licensed?
items.answer: All licensed by Florida with full liability insurance.

items.question: What areas do you cover?
items.answer: All of Kendall: The Hammocks, Kendale Lakes, Tamiami, Country Walk, Three Lakes, Richmond West.

items.quote: My AC broke on a Sunday and I thought I'd suffer all weekend. I called and within 45 minutes I had a technician at my house. He speaks Spanish, was very honest about the price. Incredible service.
items.author: Maria G.

items.quote: Another technician quoted me $1,500. They came, diagnosed the real problem and fixed it for $200. Fast, professional and fair price. 100% recommended.
items.author: Carlos R.

items.quote: Baby at home with extreme heat. We called desperately and within an hour the AC was working. Third time I've called them, always reliable. I recommend them to everyone.
items.author: Ana S.
